evidence_summary: Reintroduce an ally and establish the mechanism for Carter's infiltration.

In the central plaza of Zodanga, Carter reunites with Kantos Kan. Kan reveals his mission to find Dejah Thoris (who is rumored to be held by Prince Sab Than) and proposes a plan for Carter to join the air-scout squadron.
Over-the-shoulder shots during the planning/intelligence exchange.
The scale and height of the surrounding Zodangan architecture.
